function.message: No recorded message from Badger was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed entity resolution via canonical cast record, then exhaustively read every channel transcript file as instructed; absence of any attributed Badger message requires clarification outcome, not OK.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/badger.md identifies target as Badger (alias badger). All transcript files under 60_outbox/channels were read fully; none contains an author or author_id matching Badger/badger, so there is no last recorded message to quote.
